```
config/name="Camiel alpha-v0.0.1"
run/main_scene="res://scenes/main.tscn"
config/features=PackedStringArray("4.6", "Forward Plus")
```

### Roadmap Highlights

**Alpha v0.0.1 (Done):** Godot project created, Camiel CharacterBody2D player with idle/walk/run/jump/sit/sleep animations, playable intro scene with color blocks, Windows export.

**Alpha v0.0.2 Ideas:** Main menu with Start button, gentle background music & sound effects, one collectible (star/biscuit), short spoken/written instruction, finish marker.

**Alpha v0.0.3 Ideas:** First educational micro-tasks (touch red block, find blue, count 1-2-3), parent/teacher notes, accessibility checks.

**Design Principles:** One idea at a time, clear colors, large UI, no time pressure, no punishment-heavy failure, minimal controls.

**Known Technical Improvements:** Code signing for Windows, automated GitHub Actions exports, reduce duplicate legacy assets, proper title screen, in-game version label.

---

### CI/CD
- Godot `4.6.2 stable`, Linux export binary in CI
- CodeQL scanning (`.github/workflows/codeql.yml`)
- Dependabot for GitHub Actions (weekly Monday 08:00 Europe/Brussels)
- PR template includes child-friendly / age-appropriateness checklist
